title: Pleurothallis neoharlingii
taxonomy: Pleurothallis neoharlingii is classified within the plant kingdom as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Pleurothallis is a large and diverse group of orchids, with over 1,000 species found across the Americas. Pleurothallis neoharlingii is native to South America and is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment.
